flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ozarks Technical Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ozarks Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Ozarks Technical Community College rose 60% between 2021 and 2024 (62.3% → 100.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Ozarks Technical Community College fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.5k → $10.5k).
